expectations.text: Treats the prior content-permission PRD draft as authoritative late-stage context rather than restarting discovery
expectations.evidence: It continues from the existing PRD-draft context and performs a closeout check on top of the confirmed permission rules rather than restarting the exploration flow.

expectations.text: Performs a closeout review that separates confirmed permission rules from remaining boundary or assumption items
expectations.evidence: It lists the already confirmed permission rules, then separates one potentially blocking item from several explicitly non-blocking boundary questions.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and asks whether to generate now instead of reopening a bundled follow-up round
expectations.evidence: It says the current information is close to ready, proposes one default assumption, and asks whether to proceed with the next draft now.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-14 based on response.txt.
